title: Church Signs - Indoor & Outdoor Church Signage | Banners.com
metaDescription: Order full color, professional-looking church signs today for your next big event or sermon series. Our signs are printed on high-quality materials and easily customizable on our online designer. Church signs have never been easier to make and order! Start your order today!

Use our heavenly, high quality signage options for High Holy Days, Christmas and Easter church events, VBS and much more. Our signage can help your local community come together. Invite people to join small groups, work on community gardens or even come to worship services. VIEW PRODUCTS Shop Church Sign Products Vinyl Banners The peanut butter and jelly of the signage world, vinyl banners are staples when it comes to visibility and brand identity. This high quality vinyl material is weather-resistant, tough and good-looking. Learn More Styrene Signs This is an excellent material for indoor signage. Use this premium, full color product for directional signage or celebration displays. This material is flexible, but very sturdy. You can have these displays printed single or double sided, for ultimate visibility. Learn More Yard Signs From Easter egg hunts, to luncheons, VBS and other church events, yard signs can gain attention from streets and feet. Order them single or double sided. They’re printed in full color, so your designs will look epic. Learn More Banner Stands These custom banner holders are versatile, mobile, and easy to use. You can use them for Church bazaars, VBS and many other events. Sizes are available large and small, and everything in between. Learn More Fabric Flags Fly your Church logo high on this weather resistant fabric material. Hoist your custom flag at Bible Camp, VBS or for special events. Printed in full CMYK color, on high-quality polyester-nylon blend material, your images will look both rich and regal. Learn More Pole Banners Street light banners are a great tool for marketing upcoming events. You can share your message coming into and going out from town. Full color, available double-sided, these hearty banners will fly high with your designs. Learn More Tear Drop Flags Not, sad, stylish. These flags offer a unique shape, sizes range from 6 feet to 15 feet. Printed in full color, on premium materials, teardrop flags will boldly deliver your messages. Learn More Polymetal Signs This material is great for outdoor advertising. These signs are commonly used for exterior building signage to display your church name or detailed graphics, but can also be used for custom parking lot signage, as well. Extremely durable, and looks professional! Learn More A-Frame Signs Sidewalk, or sandwich signs play an important role in street marketing. These coroplast marvels are waterproof, sturdy and carefree. Printed in full color, your designs will appear rich and vibrant. Learn More Backdrop Banners Create a stunning backdrop for the next church photo op. These vinyl banner options are perfect for Summer Camp, weddings and more. Rich, full color material will offer amazing visuals. Learn More Customer Reviews Resources Back to Top Top 5 Yard Sign Display Tips and Tricks Enhance your church's visibility with our durable yard signs. Ideal for guiding congregants and announcing church events, our signs remain pristine in any weather. Position them where they'll inspire the most community engagement, and remember to refresh your message to maintain interest. Banners.com is your partner in spreading the Word with clarity and vigor. How To Design Your Own Sidewalk Sign Create inviting sidewalk signs for your church with Banners.com. Capture the essence of your message with succinct text and uplifting graphics that reflect your church's spirit. Stay informed about signage regulations to ensure your message is always welcome. Our customizable templates make design simple and our prints bring your message to life. Common Vinyl Banner Sizes Banners.com offers a variety of vinyl banner sizes to suit any church event or announcement. Select from standard sizes or customize to fit your space perfectly. Our banners are made for easy display and long-lasting presence, ensuring your church's message is seen and remembered. The Most Common Banner Stand Assemblies Display your church's message with our easy-to-assemble banner stands. Choose from retractable or X-Frame options for quick setup and takedown during church events or services. Each stand is portable and designed to showcase your message effectively, making every gathering a chance to connect and communicate. How to Make a Custom Decal? Personalize your church environment with custom decals from Banners.com. Our partnership with Decals.com means you get access to user-friendly design tools or professional assistance to create decals that resonate with your church's values. Perfect for any church-related activity, our decals add a special touch to your sacred space. How to Create Impactful Church Signage? Church signage has been a longstanding tradition for congregations to communicate with their community. More than just a place to display worship service times, these outdoor signs can inspire, inform, and invite engagement. Crafting effective custom church signs involves a blend of creativity, clarity, and strategy to effectively draw attention to your church. Here’s how you can master the art of creating outdoor church signs that make a meaningful impact. Highlights & Benefits of Church Signs Back to Top Multi-functional Products Versatility is the name of this signage game. You can use these products for almost any church event. Whether stuck in the lawn, flying high on a pole or anything else you need signs for, we’ve got you covered. Cost-Effective There are sign options for all budgets, big and small. From yard signs, to oversized vinyl banners, you can rest assured we have a product for you. Buy in bulk and save even more! Full Color Signage All signage is printed in premium full color. This gives rich, vibrancy to your products. Images, graphics and designs will look lively. Let your message come to life with these custom sign options. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top What kinds of banners do you offer for church signs? We offer 13 oz standard vinyl, 18 oz extra heavy duty vinyl, canvas, fabric, and mesh banners.
